title: Antitrust Enforcement, Lawsuits, and Political Money

google_search.remedies: December 2025 — behavioral framework; barred from exclusive distribution contracts; data sharing required
google_search.rejected: Chrome/Android divestiture rejected — 'only with great caution'
google_search.key_stat: Google paid $26.3B in 2021 alone to be default search engine

google_ad_tech.ruling: April 17, 2025 — liable on 2 of 3 counts (publisher ad server + ad exchange)
google_ad_tech.remedies_sought: Forced sale of AdX exchange — would be first forced tech divestiture

apple.status: Motion to dismiss denied June 2025; proceeding to trial
apple.epic_games: Judge ruled Apple 'willfully' violated injunctions; referred for criminal contempt

amazon.allegations: Anti-discounting algorithms, forced fulfillment, degraded search with ads

meta_facebook.ruling: November 18, 2025 — FTC LOST; Meta not required to spin off Instagram/WhatsApp
meta_facebook.reason: Court found TikTok and YouTube now compete directly; market definition 'unduly narrow'

microsoft_activision.ruling: FTC lost; case dismissed May 2025; deal closed October 2023

live_nation_ticketmaster.pushback: 26 states + DC rejected settlement, pursuing independent litigation

unitedhealth_change.current: DOJ criminal + civil investigations (July 2025) into Medicare billing; antitrust complaint to block Amedisys acquisition

big_pharma.streak: Top federal lobbying spender for 20+ consecutive years

us_chamber.members_fines: 111 members violated laws 15,896+ times, paying $156B+ in penalties

bills: American Innovation and Choice Online Act

ftc.fy2026_trump: $385M (10% cut; Bureau of Competition -$23M, -51 FTEs; staff 1,235→1,100)

underfunding.asymmetry: Combined FTC+DOJ ~$660M vs Big 5 tech profits $400B+ in 2024
underfunding.merger_fee_act_2022: HSR fees up to $2.25M for $5B+ deals; $1.4B additional fees over 2023-27

lina_khan_ftc.pbm_findings: Top 3 PBMs process 80% of 6.6B prescriptions; marked up specialty generics by thousands of %; $7.3B excess revenue (2017-2022)
lina_khan_ftc.express_scripts_settlement: Feb 2026 — expected to save patients up to $7B over 10 years

jonathan_kanter_doj.achievement: First criminal monopoly conviction in 40+ years
jonathan_kanter_doj.farewell: 'Plutocracy is its own kind of dictatorship'
jonathan_kanter_doj.reform: Hired from government rather than BigLaw to address revolving door

healthcare_antitrust.hospital_mergers: 1,000+ mergers (2002-2020); FTC challenged only 13; 238 should have been flagged; led to 5%+ price increases
healthcare_antitrust.unitedhealth: Criminal + civil DOJ investigation; 'Patients Over Profits Act' proposed (Sept 2025)

seed_chemical_mergers.result: 3 companies control 70% of agrochemicals + 60% of commercial seeds

agricultural_antitrust.trump_eo_dec_2025: DOJ/FTC task forces investigating food supply chain anticompetitive behavior

private_equity_antitrust.ftc_doj_inquiry: May 2024 — joint inquiry into serial acquisitions across all sectors
private_equity_antitrust.welsh_carson_settlement: Jan 2025 — landmark PE roll-up case (anesthesiology practices)
private_equity_antitrust.veterinary: $51.6B PE investment; 30%+ of practices now corporate (up from 8%); 75%+ of specialty care corporate
private_equity_antitrust.funeral_homes: SCI charges 42% more than independents; owns ~2,000 locations

realpage_rent_pricing.settlement: November 2025 — banned real-time competitor data; 3-year monitor

revolving_door.scale: 60%+ of FTC/DOJ Antitrust staff (2014-2021) went to BigLaw, corporations, or consulting firms
revolving_door.economists: 17 of 20 most recent deputy AAGs for economic analysis went to corporate consulting firms (85%)
revolving_door.billing_rates: Former DOJ official Dennis Carlton charged $1,350/hour for corporate expert witness work

state_ag_enforcement.venue_act_2023: State AGs can pursue federal antitrust cases in chosen venues without consolidation
state_ag_enforcement.tech_coalitions: 16+ states in Apple case; 17-18 in Amazon; 39 in Live Nation
state_ag_enforcement.nar_settlement: $418M; eliminated automatic buyer agent commission; final approval Nov 2024

consumer_harm.public_firms_lost: ~50% fewer publicly traded firms than early 1970s
consumer_harm.nber_2023: Antitrust enforcement increases economic activity — contradicts Chicago School

historical_context.chicago_school: Bork's 1978 'Antitrust Paradox' introduced consumer welfare standard
historical_context.new_brandeis: Khan's 2017 'Amazon's Antitrust Paradox' challenged Chicago School framework

2025_2026_developments.trump_continuity: Continued all major tech cases inherited from Biden and Trump 1.0
2025_2026_developments.trump_v_slaughter: SCOTUS case challenging Humphrey's Executor (1935); oral arguments Dec 2025; may affect all independent agencies
2025_2026_developments.live_nation_settlement: March 2026 — $280M fund + 15% fee cap; 26 states rejected
